criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 1 documents the full disambiguation flow: search_design_context() call with num_results=5, results grouped by type (DDRs, API Contracts, Data Models) with relevance scores, explicit user selection required before proceeding. Includes re-search and cancel options. Tests: TestDisambiguationFlow (5 tests) all pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Spec Phase 1 documents the full disambiguation flow: search_design_context() call with num_results=5, results grouped by type (DDRs, API Contracts, Data Models) with relevance scores, explicit user selection required before proceeding. Includes re-search and cancel options. Tests: TestDisambiguationFlow (5 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 2A documents full DDR temporal superseding: existing DDR status set to 'superseded', new DDR created with supersedes field referencing old entity_id, scan_next_ddr_number() used for numbering, prior DDR remains queryable via search_design_context(). Both DDRs upserted to Graphiti. Tests: TestTemporalSuperseding (5 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 2B documents full API contract update flow: presents current contract with endpoints listed, captures proposed changes with change type selection (Add/Modify/Remove/Schema), displays diff between current and proposed, regenerates OpenAPI spec section via regenerate_openapi_section(), validates with openapi-spec-validator. Tests: TestAPIContractUpdateFlow (5 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 4 documents feature spec staleness detection: queries feature_specs Graphiti group for scenarios referencing changed entity_ids, flags results as potentially stale, offers 3 choices: [R]e-run /feature-spec, [A]ccept delta, [S]kip. Tests: TestFeatureSpecStaleness (4 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 6 documents C4 L3 re-review gate: generates revised Component diagrams using DesignWriter.write_component_diagram(), presents each diagram for mandatory approval with [A]pprove / [R]evise / [R]eject interaction, cannot proceed without approval. Tests: TestC4L3ReviewGate (4 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Staleness flagging on downstream Graphiti nodes
criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 5 documents downstream staleness flagging: searches for downstream Graphiti nodes referencing changed entities via search_design_context(), flags affected nodes as potentially stale, reports summary with counts of changed artefacts and affected downstream nodes. Tests: TestDownstreamStaleness (2 tests) all pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Spec Phase 5 documents downstream staleness flagging: searches for downstream Graphiti nodes referencing changed entities via search_design_context(), flags affected nodes as potentially stale, reports summary with counts of changed artefacts and affected downstream nodes. Tests: TestDownstreamStaleness (2 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 7 documents Graphiti persistence: upserts changed DDRs via upsert_design_decision() to project_design group, upserts changed contracts via upsert_api_contract() to api_contracts group, upserts changed data models via upsert_data_model() to project_design group. Uses get_graphiti() for client initialization. Tests: TestGraphitiIntegration (4 tests) all pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Spec Phase 7 documents Graphiti persistence: upserts changed DDRs via upsert_design_decision() to project_design group, upserts changed contracts via upsert_api_contract() to api_contracts group, upserts changed data models via upsert_data_model() to project_design group. Uses get_graphiti() for client initialization. Tests: TestGraphitiIntegration (4 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Graceful Degradation section documents full fallback: WARNING message displayed, continues without persistence using markdown artefacts only, lists limitations (local file scanning, staleness detection skipped), offers user choice to continue or cancel. Partial failure handling also documented. Tests: TestGracefulDegradation (3 tests) all pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Contradiction detection: flag if proposed design change contradicts existing ADRs
criteria_verification.evidence: Spec Phase 3 documents contradiction detection: queries project_decisions Graphiti group for existing ADRs via get_relevant_context_for_topic(), compares proposed changes against ADR constraints, flags contradictions with specific details, offers resolution options: [R]evise change, [S]upersede ADR, [A]ccept risk. Tests: TestContradictionDetection (4 tests) all pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Spec Phase 3 documents contradiction detection: queries project_decisions Graphiti group for existing ADRs via get_relevant_context_for_topic(), compares proposed changes against ADR constraints, flags contradictions with specific details, offers resolution options: [R]evise change, [S]upersede ADR, [A]ccept risk. Tests: TestContradictionDetection (4 tests) all pass.

issues.description: No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met.
